products.name: Cosmic
products.description: A celestial journey of crisp orchard fruits and soft musky undertones. Cosmic captures the vastness of the universe in a drop of liquid starlight.

products.name: Flawless
products.description: A pristine marine breeze blending with aromatic woods. Flawless is an elegant statement of freshness, confidence, and enduring charm.

products.name: Forbidden Orchid
products.description: A dark, mysterious blend of rare orchids, rich coffee, and warm vanilla. An alluring fragrance that defies expectations and leaves a lingering trail.

products.name: Mi Amor
products.description: An enchanting, romantic symphony of sweet cherry and powdery amber. A tribute to love, tenderness, and warm skin-hugging embraces.

products.name: Heaven's Garden
products.description: A lush botanical paradise suspended in clean coastal air. Refreshing mint and warm tonka beans create a sensory oasis of absolute tranquility.

products.name: Vanillian Dream
products.description: Our signature solid perfume balm. A warm, skin-hugging dream of rich Madagascar vanilla, toasted coconut, and velvet musk. Compact, spill-proof, and intensely luxurious.

products.name: Aureya Solid Gold Balm
products.description: A premium solid perfume balm crafted with skin-loving oils and beeswax. Offers a subtle, skin-hugging release of signature sandalwood and warm amber.

products.name: Aureya Travel Trio
products.description: The ultimate portable luxury. A curated set of three solid perfume balms: Cosmic, Mi Amor, and Heaven's Garden. Spill-proof, skin-nourishing, and perfect for travel.
